days.label: Push Day — Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Dropped 10 lb from 135 — last week set 3 broke at 6 reps (below 8). Keep form tight, hit 8+ on every set.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Up 5 lb from 30 — crushed it last week (11/11/10 @ RPE 5-6). 30 degree incline.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 35 — got the reps last week but RPE 9-10. Brace core and grind it.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.notes: NEW — replacing lateral raises this week for shoulder variety. Alternate arms or both together. Pick a weight you can hit 10-12 with at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 95 — clean reps last week (12/10/8). Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Kickbacks
exercises.notes: NEW — replacing overhead tricep extension. Keep upper arm parallel to floor, squeeze at extension.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps — 5 min

days.label: Pull Day — Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 185 — hit all 10s last week but RPE crept to 8. One more week here, then we go up.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Dropped 5 lb from 50 — set 2 broke at 7 reps last week. Each side, squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.notes: Up 5 lb from 30 — flew through it (12/16/12 @ RPE 6). Feel the lat stretch.

exercises.name: Band Face Pulls
exercises.notes: NEW — replacing reverse flyes. Anchor band on rack, pull to face with external rotation at top. Bands not weighted, log perceived resistance level.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Up 5 lb from 55 — clean 10s at RPE 6-7. Strict form, no swing.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Dropped 2.5 lb from 30 — set 3 dropped to 7 reps at RPE 10. Neutral grip, control the negative.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back — 5 min

days.label: Leg Day — Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Last Friday was skipped — pick a working weight you can hit 8-10 with at RPE 7-8 to re-establish baseline. Below parallel.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: NEW — DB version for variety. Slight knee bend, dumbbells slide down thighs, feel hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Each leg, rear foot on bench. Skipped last week — pick a manageable DB weight.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Back on bench, drive through heels, squeeze glutes at top. Skipped last week — establish baseline.

exercises.name: Barbell Calf Raises
exercises.notes: NEW — barbell version for heavier loading. Bar on back, full ROM, pause at top.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.notes: NEW — replacing hanging leg raises. From knees, roll out and back under control. Can substitute with barbell rollout if no wheel.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors — 5 min
